description_long: This bungalow features a modern, single-story design with a flat, dark roof and large glass windows along the main facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low white wall and includes a landscaped garden with geometric hedges, a rectangular reflecting pool, and several tall, sculpted trees. A covered carport with a black vehicle is situated at the front, adjacent to a paved driveway and entry gate. The backyard area includes a small patio with outdoor seating and a pink pergola structure, as well as additional greenery and decorative elements. The main entrance is accentuated by a pathway flanked by manicured shrubs, leading directly to the glass-fronted living area. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and well-integrated with its outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a covered carport, surrounded by a low white wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, entry pathway, reflecting pool, and carport with a black vehicle.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard patio, pink pergola, and tall sculpted trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof, carport, and a glimpse into the interior living space.
description_view_3: Oblique view emphasizing the geometric garden layout, outdoor seating, and the relationship between the carport and main entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass panels and grouped side windows
